description: Detects unsafe type assertion patterns in TypeScript security context: type predicate functions using 'as any' (guard may lie about runtime type), generic functions returning JSON.parse without validation (caller trusts arbitrary shape). Simplified from Rust: flags all as_expression nodes within function bodies (cannot filter to only type predicate functions or check for JSON.parse + return without validation without #match? predicate support). All type assertions flagged.

flag.message: Type assertion detected -- verify type predicate functions do not use 'as any' and generic parse functions include runtime validation
